tasks.name: Book a 60-minute stress management session within 7 days under $150 with the highest-rated coach
tasks.description: Schedule a single 60-minute coaching session focused on stress management within the next 7 calendar days, with a coach whose price per session is $150 or less, and who has the highest rating among those options.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main navigation menu item labeled "Coaches" or "Find a Coach".
In the topic or specialty filter, select "Stress Management" (or the closest matching topic).
Open the price filter and set the maximum price per session to "$150".
Open the session length filter and select "60 minutes" as the desired session duration.
Open the sort dropdown and choose the option that sorts by "Rating" or "Highest Rated".
From the sorted list, click on the first coach profile card (the highest-rated coach that meets your filters).
On the coach’s profile, click the "Book Session" or "Schedule Session" button for a 60-minute session.
In the booking calendar, select a date that falls within the next 7 days from today and choose any available start time between 6:00 PM and 9:00 PM.

On the booking form, enter your name, a dummy email address (e.g., "user@example.com"), briefly describe your stress management goal in at least one sentence in the notes or goals field, and click the button to confirm or submit the booking.

tasks.name: Add the cheapest 4-session career change coaching package under $400 to cart
tasks.description: Find coaching packages related to career change, filter for 4-session packages under $400, sort by price, and add the cheapest qualifying package to the cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main navigation menu item labeled "Services" or "Coaching Packages".
In the category or topic filter, select "Career Change" or the closest matching career-related option.
Use the sessions or package size filter to select packages that include exactly "4 sessions".
Open the price filter and set the maximum package price to "$400".
Use the sort dropdown to sort the list by "Price: Low to High" or equivalent.
Click on the first package card in the sorted results list (the cheapest 4-session career change package under $400).
On the package detail page, click the "Add to Cart" or "Add Package to Cart" button.
After adding the package, click on the cart icon or "View Cart" link in the header to open the cart page.

tasks.name: Create a reading list with 3 productivity articles (4+ minute read, last 6 months)
tasks.description: Find and save three productivity-related blog articles that are at least 4 minutes reading time and published within the last 6 months, then save them into a reading list named "Productivity Sprint".
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main navigation menu item labeled "Blog" or "Articles".
Use the search bar within the blog section to type "productivity" and submit the search.
In the blog filters, set the date or time frame filter to show articles from the "Last 6 months".
Use the read-time filter (or similar) to show only articles with a reading time of at least "4 minutes".
From the filtered list, click on the first article title to open its detail page.
On the article page, click the "Save" or "Add to List" button, choose the option to create a new list, and enter "Productivity Sprint" as the list name, then save.
Navigate back to the search results or use the browser back button to return to the filtered productivity article list.

Open the next two different articles in the filtered list (e.g., the second and third results), and on each article page click "Save" or "Add to List" and select the existing "Productivity Sprint" list.
After saving all three articles, use the header or profile menu to navigate to the "Reading Lists" or "Saved Articles" section and click on the "Productivity Sprint" list to open it.

tasks.name: Join a 14-day self-discipline challenge starting in the next 14 days with daily email reminders only
tasks.description: Enroll in a 14-day self-discipline challenge that starts within the next 14 days, configure it to send daily email reminders, and ensure SMS or text reminders are turned off.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main navigation menu item labeled "Challenges" or "Programs".
Use the topic or category filter to select "Self-Discipline" or the closest matching theme.
Use the duration filter to select challenges that last exactly "14 days".
From the list of 14-day self-discipline challenges, click on a challenge whose start date is within the next 14 days from today.
On the challenge detail page, click the "Join Challenge" or "Enroll" button.
On the enrollment form, enter your name and a dummy email address (e.g., "user@example.com") into the appropriate fields.
In the reminder settings section, select "Daily" or an equivalent option for email reminders and ensure that any toggle or checkbox for SMS/text reminders is turned off or left unselected.
If a preferred reminder time option is available, choose a reminder time of "8:00 AM".
Click the button to confirm or submit your enrollment into the challenge.

tasks.name: Complete a life balance self-assessment and save the results to your dashboard
tasks.description: Locate a life balance self-assessment tool, answer all questions, and save the resulting score or report to the personal dashboard section.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main navigation menu item labeled "Tools" or "Assessments".
In the assessment category filter, select "Life Balance" or the closest matching category.
From the list of life balance assessments, click on an assessment that indicates it has between 10 and 30 questions.
On the assessment start page, click the "Start Assessment" or "Begin" button.

For each question in the assessment, select any response value between the mid and high range (for example, choose values between 5 and 8 on a 1–10 scale, or the middle or higher options on multiple-choice questions) until all questions are answered.
After answering all questions, click the "Finish", "View Results", or similar button to complete the assessment.
On the results page, click the "Save to My Dashboard", "Save Results", or equivalent button.
Use the header or profile menu to navigate to the "Dashboard" or "My Dashboard" section.
Within the dashboard, click on the entry or card for the life balance assessment you just completed to open its saved summary page.

tasks.name: Contact a relationship coach with free consultation, rating ≥4.5, and at least 10 reviews
tasks.description: Find a relationship-focused coach who offers a free consultation, has an average rating of at least 4.5 stars, and has 10 or more reviews, then send a contact message specifying your preferred time of day and mentioning communication issues.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main navigation menu item labeled "Coaches" or "Find a Coach".
In the topic or specialty filter, select "Relationships" or the closest matching category.
Use the feature or offer filter to select coaches who provide a "Free Consultation".
Apply a rating filter to show only coaches with an average rating of "4.5" stars or higher, and a reviews filter (if available) to show coaches with "10+ reviews".
Use the sort dropdown to sort the results by "Most Reviews" or "Review Count: High to Low".
Click on the first coach profile in the sorted list that meets these filters.
On the coach’s profile page, click the "Contact", "Message", or "Request Consultation" button.

In the contact form, enter your name and a dummy email address (e.g., "user@example.com"), select "Morning" as your preferred time of day from any available dropdown, and type a message of at least two sentences that includes the word "communication".
Click the button to send or submit the message to the coach.

tasks.name: Bookmark two time management posts and one worksheet for working parents (≤10 pages)
tasks.description: Find two time management blog posts and one worksheet specifically for working parents, where the worksheet is 10 pages or fewer, then save or bookmark all three resources in your personal area.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main navigation menu item labeled "Blog" or "Articles".
Use the blog tag or audience filter to select content tagged "Working Parents" or an equivalent audience tag.
In the blog search bar, type "time management" and submit the search.
From the filtered results, open the first two different blog posts that match time management for working parents (e.g., click on the first and second post titles).
On each of these two blog post pages, click the "Bookmark", "Save", or "Add to Favorites" button to add them to your personal saved items.
Return to the homepage or use the main navigation to go to a "Resources", "Downloads", or "Worksheets" section.
In the resources filters, select the topic "Time Management" and the audience "Working Parents" (or closest equivalents).
Use a length or page-count filter (if available) to show only worksheets that are "10 pages" or fewer, then click on the first worksheet in the filtered list to open its detail page.
On the worksheet detail page, click the "Save", "Add to Toolkit", or similar button to add it to your personal saved resources.

tasks.name: Build and save a custom coaching plan with 2 individual sessions and 1 group workshop under $300 total
tasks.description: Use the custom plan builder to create a plan that includes exactly two individual coaching sessions and one group workshop, with the total displayed cost not exceeding $300, and then save the plan under the name "March Focus".
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main navigation menu item labeled "Build Your Plan", "Custom Plan", or similar.
In the individual sessions section, apply a price filter to show sessions priced at "$120" or less per session.

From the filtered individual sessions, add two different sessions to your plan by clicking an "Add" or "+" button on each of two session cards (for example, one on stress management and one on goal setting).
Scroll to the group workshops section and apply a price filter to show workshops that cost "$80" or less.
From the filtered workshops, click the "Add" or "+" button on one workshop related to productivity, focus, or a similar topic to include it in your plan.

Review the plan summary area on the page and, if the total exceeds "$300", remove one of the more expensive items and replace it with a cheaper option so that the total cost displayed is "$300" or less.
Once the plan includes exactly 2 individual sessions and 1 workshop with a total cost of $300 or less, click the "Save Plan" or "Save" button.
In the plan name field that appears, type "March Focus" and confirm by clicking the save or confirm button.
Use the navigation or profile menu to go to the "My Plans" or "Saved Plans" section and click on the "March Focus" plan to open its detail view.
